deviations.description: The process model prohibits blood collection if the donor has recently undergone surgery OR received a blood transfusion, but the new requirement only prohibits collection if BOTH conditions are true. The process model allows fewer donors to donate than the new requirement permits, resulting in non-compliance with the updated, less restrictive rule.

The process model continues to enforce the prohibition on blood collection for donors who have only recently undergone surgery or only received a blood transfusion, which is stricter than the new requirement that only prohibits collection when both conditions are met.
